sessions.title: The Quiet Room
sessions.subtitle: A still, voice-led night practice shaped by simple presence and soft breath
sessions.description: A quieter, more spacious sleep session for nights that feel mentally full. Built around simple presence and a softer, Zen-shaped way of letting thought pass without following it.

sessions.title: Still Waters At Night
sessions.subtitle: A voice-led night practice for deep unwinding and sleep
sessions.description: A deeply unwinding sleep meditation with a steady human voice, slower exhales, and long settling pauses. Made for nights when the body is tired but the mind is still gently moving.
